requirementChecks.requirement: Guest mode title strip should use Bethel Connect branding.
Access request form should require a mobile number and show a clear prompt.
Access request form should clearly ask the user to select a church location.
Rejected requests should show the rejection reason to the user.
My Team Plan should exist as a dedicated tile.
My Team Plan should provide Current Sunday and Next Sunday selectors.
My Team Plan should provide explicit team navigation controls.
My Team Plan should show a No plan yet summary before the detail is opened.
The user app should surface clearer offline/error states for content and team plans.
Notification setup should not depend only on EXPO_PUBLIC_EXPO_PROJECT_ID.
Admin navigation should use Manage Members and Add Members and Teams labels.
Team Leader should not see Approval Queue or Manage Members in admin navigation.
Team Leader should not be able to publish announcements or events and should see a note.
Event cancellation should require confirmation and use Cancel Event wording.
Sunday service order should provide Current Sunday and Next Sunday selectors.
Rejecting an approval should require a rejection reason.
Deleting a member should require an explicit confirmation dialog.
Only super admins, church admins, pastors, and team leaders should be allowed into the admin app.
Rejection reason should be persisted when an access request is rejected.
Access requests should not allow self-elevation beyond member during signup.
Automated cleanup for expired content and old reminders should exist.
Mobile notification device registration should write Expo device tokens to Firestore.

qualityChecks.requirement: Admin app should not silently show mock access requests or assignments on live Firestore read failures.
User app should avoid showing mock announcements/events when Firebase is unavailable in production mode.
User app should avoid showing mock team plans when Firebase is unavailable in production mode.
